title: Evangelion in the Cupboard
wikitext:
[]: Evangelion in the Cupboard Post by EVA Unit 01 » Tue Jul 26, 2011 2:38 am So I'm new here, and just figured 'd start off with something I thought would be funny. What if you threw Unit 01 in the indian cubbard and brought it to life. Would it have a little AT field and try to attack you thinking you're an angel? I thought it was funny as hell XD

[]: Post by SAWgunner » Tue Jul 26, 2011 9:34 am I remember those books from when I was 9! I think it would be cooler to throw Unit-00 in the cupboard. Then I could watch it bash its little head into my bookshelf. Better yet, throw all of my Rei figures in there and put them in a fishtank.

[]: Post by MandarinOrange » Tue Jul 26, 2011 10:32 am I could see it trying to attack the person who put her in there. It would be cute~ But if it were me putting Eva figures into a magical cupboard, it would be my Mass Produced Eva revoltech and my cute little Asuka figure.

[]: Post by Yue » Tue Jul 26, 2011 10:42 am MandarinOrange wrote: I could see it trying to attack the person who put her in there. It would be cute~ But if it were me putting Eva figures into a magical cupboard, it would be my Mass Produced Eva revoltech and my cute little Asuka figure.

[]: Post by EVA Unit 01 » Tue Jul 26, 2011 12:26 pm Well hell, What if I threw my perfect grade Eva unit 01 in there? And I lol'd hard at the Rei's in the fish tank. Yeah, it totally brings them to life... Makes you wonder what would happen lmao.

[]: Post by CJD » Tue Jul 26, 2011 12:33 pm MandarinOrange wrote: my cute little Asuka figure.

[]: Post by EVA Unit 01 » Tue Jul 26, 2011 2:20 pm I'm a huge Asuka fan too. If I know if I threw her in there, she'd probably come out and kick my ass. If you tossed Sachiel amd Eva unit 01 in there, open it uo, you find them fighting lol

[]: Post by Tankred » Tue Jul 26, 2011 3:45 pm This reminds of the thread on /m/ today about putting a RGM-79 GM in the magic cupboard...

[]: Post by tehprognoob » Tue Jul 26, 2011 3:50 pm those 1-1 scale anime character pillow things. Get one of Asuka and one of Rei, put them in a cupboard. Hellz yes!

[]: Post by CJD » Tue Jul 26, 2011 4:59 pm tehprognoob wrote: those 1-1 scale anime character pillow things. Get one of Asuka and one of Rei, put them in a cupboard. Hellz yes!

[]: Post by SAWgunner » Tue Jul 26, 2011 6:31 pm Yeah, sentient fabric head cushion. Sexy.

[]: Post by TehDonutKing » Tue Jul 26, 2011 6:33 pm What about a Rei sex doll?

[]: Post by Stryker » Tue Jul 26, 2011 6:46 pm TehDonutKing wrote: What about a Rei sex doll?

[]: Post by Tankred » Tue Jul 26, 2011 7:42 pm TehDonutKing wrote: What about a Rei sex doll?

[]: Post by tehprognoob » Tue Jul 26, 2011 8:07 pm CJD wrote: Skip Rei imo, who needs her when you have Asuka all to yourself.

[]: Post by SecretPerson » Tue Jul 26, 2011 8:26 pm tehprognoob wrote: I kid; Asuka will burn you out. You need Rei to cool you down. Otherwise you'll end up like a burnt out lightbulb, unable to enjoy time with Asuka.

[]: Post by CJD » Tue Jul 26, 2011 8:53 pm SecretPerson wrote: But then again, we're talking about self-conscious pillows here. You could lock the Asuka cushion in a cabinet or something whenever you get tired of her (but she would be pretty pissed off afterwards. Oh well).

[]: Post by Stryker » Tue Jul 26, 2011 8:59 pm What CJD said. Good luck locking an Asuka pillow in the cupboard, let alone Asuka.

[]: Post by EVA Unit 01 » Tue Jul 26, 2011 9:15 pm Wear her out and then when she's sleeping, lock her in there. I mean, the next time you unlock the cupboard, you'd have to be wearing armor is all lmao

[]: Post by SecretPerson » Tue Jul 26, 2011 9:21 pm CJD wrote: Inconceivable.
